title: Articles: a, an, the, zero article
explanation:
Articles review

Use a / an for one non-specific thing, the for something specific or already known, and no article for many plural or uncountable nouns in a general sense.

questions.feedback: A introduces one non-specific singular noun.

questions.text: Can you close [*the|a|zero] window? It is cold.
questions.feedback: The because both speakers know which window.
No article for music in general.

questions.text: We visited [*the|a|zero] British Museum while we were in London.
questions.feedback: The with names like the British Museum.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I need ____ advice about my CV. | *some | an | the
questions.feedback: Advice is uncountable and often takes no article or some.

questions.text: They went to ____ school by bus. | *zero | the | a
questions.feedback: No article in the general expression go to school.

questions.text: Could you pass me ____ salt, please? | *the | a | zero
She wants to become ____ engineer. | *an | a | the
I saw [*a|the|zero] man outside your house, but I did not recognise him.
[*The|A|Zero] sun was setting when we arrived.
Children should not spend all day on [*zero|the|a] social media.
questions.feedback: No article for social media in general.

questions.text: She works in [*a|the|zero] hospital near the station.
